performanceIssues.issue: N+1 Query Pattern: ToListAsync() materializes assignments, then Where() filters in memory instead of database
performanceIssues.suggestion: Apply Where filter before ToListAsync: context.EngagementPapds.Where(ep => ep.PapdId == papdId).ToListAsync()

performanceIssues.issue: Inefficient memory allocation: Loading EngagementAssignments collection then filtering with Where().ToList() instead of filtering at database level
Double iteration inefficiency: ToHashSet() for lookup then Where().ToList() creates extra materialization
performanceIssues.suggestion: Eliminate ToList() call: var availablePapds = papds.Where(p => !assignedPapdIds.Contains(p.Id)); only materialize when needed for binding

performanceIssues.issue: Redundant query pattern: managers loaded, then Where().ToList() filters which could be done in database
performanceIssues.suggestion: Keep data materialized once per load, avoid re-querying or use LINQ to Objects efficiently

performanceIssues.issue: Unnecessary materialization: engagement.ManagerAssignments.ToList() when only iterating for deletion - use LINQ to Objects or RemoveRange directly
performanceIssues.suggestion: Store reference without ToList(): var existingAssignments = engagement.ManagerAssignments; then iterate

performanceIssues.issue: Duplicate pattern: Same inefficiency as ManagerAssignments, ToList() on collection navigation property
performanceIssues.suggestion: Apply same optimization: reference collection directly without unnecessary materialization

performanceIssues.issue: Dictionary lookup caching with tuple return - reasonable optimization but cache could be local-scoped function variable instead of parameter dependency
performanceIssues.suggestion: Pattern is sound for repeated access patterns, no change required

performanceIssues.issue: N+1 behavior: parsedRows.Select().Distinct().ToList() creates temporary list then queried against database
performanceIssues.suggestion: Acceptable pattern - list is needed for .Contains() check; ensure distinct is applied before ToList()

performanceIssues.issue: Repeated string normalization in loops - NormalizeRank() called multiple times with same input
performanceIssues.suggestion: Cache normalized rank value in loop: var normalizedRank = NormalizeRank(value); then reuse throughout iteration

performanceIssues.issue: String comparison in loop without case-insensitive normalization cached
performanceIssues.suggestion: Normalize once before loop: var normalizedRank = NormalizeRank(rank); then compare

performanceIssues.issue: Multiple Where().ToList() calls in sequence on Items collection (lines 535, 561, 621, 648, 768, 859, 1407)
performanceIssues.suggestion: Cache filtered results: var editableItems = Items.Where(i => i.IsEditable).ToList(); reuse this variable

performanceIssues.issue: Sequential for-loops modifying collection - potential performance issue with repeated Count checks
performanceIssues.suggestion: Use foreach with index or store count: int count = remainingLines.Count; for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)

performanceIssues.issue: NormalizeHeader() method called repeatedly in loops without caching normalized values
performanceIssues.suggestion: Cache header normalization: var normalizedHeader = NormalizeHeader(candidate); reuse in comparisons

performanceIssues.issue: Where().ToList() on email collection - small data set but pattern could be optimized
performanceIssues.suggestion: For small collections acceptable, but: var recipients = context.CustomerEmails?.Where(e => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(e)); avoid ToList() unless binding

solidViolations.issue: Single Responsibility Violation: MainWindowViewModel has 11 direct dependencies (10 sub-ViewModels + 2 services) and manages navigation, sidebar persistence, messenger subscription
solidViolations.suggestion: Extract navigation logic to separate NavigationService, sidebar persistence to SettingsPersistenceService, reduce to 5-7 core dependencies

solidViolations.issue: Single Responsibility Violation: 8 dependencies + manages CRUD, assignment operations, filtering, and dialog coordination
solidViolations.suggestion: Extract assignment logic to separate AssignmentCoordinator service, dialog operations to DialogCoordinator interface

solidViolations.issue: Hard-coded header aliases and column mappings (300+ lines of string arrays) - violates Open/Closed principle, not extensible for schema changes
solidViolations.suggestion: Move header definitions to external config (JSON/YAML), implement IHeaderMapProvider interface for runtime header resolution

solidViolations.issue: Duplicate logic: SyncManagerAssignments and SyncPapdAssignments methods have nearly identical implementation (violates DRY)
solidViolations.suggestion: Extract common assignment sync logic to generic SyncEntityAssignments<T> method accepting assignment collection and lookup

solidViolations.issue: Liskov Substitution Violation: Service doesn't properly honor IPlannedAllocationService contract - includes fiscal year lock validation outside interface scope
solidViolations.suggestion: Move FiscalYearLockGuard checks to separate IAllocationValidator service or explicitly document lock enforcement in interface

solidViolations.issue: Dependency Inversion Violation: Depends on concrete DialogService instead of IDialogService interface
solidViolations.suggestion: Inject IDialogService interface instead of concrete DialogService for testability

solidViolations.issue: Missing abstraction: Sorting logic (BuildFinancialEvolutionSortKey) tightly coupled to implementation, not extractable for different sort strategies
solidViolations.suggestion: Implement ISortKeyProvider interface for closing period sorting to enable strategy swapping

solidViolations.issue: Fat Interface: ImportServiceBase and FullManagementDataImporter expose too many public utility methods (ParseDecimal, ParseInt, ParseDate, ParsePercent, SanitizeNumericString)
solidViolations.suggestion: Segregate parsing logic into IValueParser interface with specialized implementations (DecimalParser, IntParser, DateParser)

solidViolations.issue: Hard-coded status parsing logic (ParseStatus method) - not extensible for new engagement statuses without code change
solidViolations.suggestion: Implement IStatusResolver interface or use enum-based mapping from configuration

dryViolations.issue: DRY Violation: SyncManagerAssignments (lines 2080-2120) and SyncPapdAssignments (lines 2145-2190) are nearly identical - same loop, same logic, just different entity types
dryViolations.suggestion: Create generic method: int SyncEntityAssignments<TEntity>(context, engagement, guiIds, entityByGui, missingGuiSet) where TEntity : IAssignableEntity

dryViolations.issue: Duplicate normalization methods: NormalizeRank (line 664), NormalizeCode (line 669) both implement similar whitespace+lowercase pattern
dryViolations.suggestion: Create single NormalizeIdentifier(string value, string? additionalPattern = null) method, use for all identifier types

dryViolations.issue: Repeated pattern: NormalizeWhitespace called before NormalizeToUpperInvariant in multiple methods - combine into single method
Repeated error handling pattern: Delete, DeleteData, and Assign operations all use identical try-catch-Toast pattern (lines 95-110, 120-133, 155-170)
dryViolations.suggestion: Extract to OperationExecutor: await ExecuteAsync(() => operation, successKey, errorKey)

dryViolations.issue: Repeated Where().ToList() filter pattern: Items.Where(line => line.IsEditable).ToList() appears 7 times (lines 535, 561, 621, 648, 768, 859, 1407)
dryViolations.suggestion: Add property: ObservableCollection<InvoicePlanLineViewModel> EditableItems => Items.Where(l => l.IsEditable); use throughout

dryViolations.issue: Repeated null-check and normalization pattern: if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(normalized)) checks appear multiple times (lines 232, 246, 291, 307)
dryViolations.suggestion: Extract validation: private bool TryValidateNormalizedRank(string normalizedRank, out string error)

dryViolations.issue: Repeated string comparison pattern: String.Equals with StringComparison.Ordinal/OrdinalIgnoreCase used 20+ times in row processing loop
dryViolations.suggestion: Extract StringComparison selection logic to method: StringComparison GetComparisonForField(string fieldName)

dryViolations.issue: Repeated sort key generation pattern: TryParsePeriodDate, TryExtractDigits, and Normalize called for every snapshot in list
dryViolations.suggestion: Pre-generate sort keys once: var sortedSnapshots = snapshots.Select(s => (s, GetSortKey(s.ClosingPeriodId))).OrderBy(...)

ooIssues.issue: Missing abstraction: AssignEngagementsAsync duplicates logic found in ManagerService.AssignEngagementsAsync - indicates need for common assignment strategy
ooIssues.suggestion: Create IAssignmentStrategy interface: AssignEntitiesAsync(context, masterEntityId, slaveIds); implement for both PAPD and Manager

ooIssues.issue: Missing polymorphism: Column resolution, row parsing, and data transformation are all concrete implementations - should use strategy pattern for extensibility
ooIssues.suggestion: Create IImportStrategy interface with ResolveColumns, ParseRows, UpsertData; allow runtime strategy selection

ooIssues.issue: Poor encapsulation: public fields and over-exposed internals (EngagementPapds, ManagerAssignments, FinancialEvolutions, etc. all directly mutable)
ooIssues.suggestion: Convert to private setters: public IReadOnlyCollection<EngagementPapd> Papds { get; private set; }; add AddPapd() method for mutations

ooIssues.issue: Inheritance anti-pattern: Excel manipulation logic mixed in data layer - should extract to separate ExcelWriter service
ooIssues.suggestion: Create IExcelWriter interface with Write(worksheet, data), implement in separate layer

ooIssues.issue: Missing strategy pattern: Multiple sequential Where().ToList() filters on same collection - should use Composite or Chain filter strategy
ooIssues.suggestion: Implement ILineFilter interface: ApplyFilter(items); compose multiple filters instead of repeated inline LINQ

ooIssues.issue: Insufficient abstraction: Header matching uses hard-coded normalization - should use extensible IHeaderMatcher interface
ooIssues.suggestion: Create IHeaderMatcher with Match(candidate, expected), implement OrdinalIgnoreCaseMatcher, ContainsMatcher, ExactMatcher

ooIssues.issue: Missing composition: Status parsing tightly coupled to service - should inject IStatusParser for testability and extensibility
ooIssues.suggestion: Inject IStatusParser interface; implement EnumBasedStatusParser or ConfigurationBasedStatusParser

ooIssues.issue: Missing abstraction: Validation logic embedded in ViewModel - should extract to separate IAllocationValidator service
ooIssues.suggestion: Create IAllocationValidator interface with Validate(allocation, context); inject for separation of concerns
